title: Son of a Liche
author: J. Zachary Pike
description: A doubly disgraced Dwarven hero. A band of accident-prone adventurers. Giving redemption a second shot may have been a grave mistake... If you like rib-tickling shenanigans, second-rate heroes, and imaginative new takes on tired tropes, then you'll love J. Zachary Pike's hilarious blend of finance and high fantasy.
